crm.title: CRM
crm.description: Leads, companies, contacts, deals, and activities — lead capture, conversion, and a stage-tracked pipeline (vendored logic).

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.description: Products with prices and lightweight stock tracking — pick a product and the price flows onto the invoice (vendored logic).

invoicing.title: Invoicing
invoicing.description: Invoices, line items, and payments — with Stripe payment links (vendored logic).

communications.title: Communications
communications.description: Message log, templates, and campaigns for outbound communication.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Records every data change (create/update/delete) into an audit_log object.
